text: Many people stand around looking at a giraffe being fed.
A group of baseball players practice bunt hitting.
A man with an orange shirt hurls a frisbee in front of him.
A large architectural tower building with a clock sits in front of a clear blue sky.
Four men working in a slaughterhouse while two men stand and stare into the camera.
A pitcher and men during a baseball game with people watching.
A very big and tasty looking pizza with toppings.
A man points at the wall in his kitchen.
A school bus is parked in front of a building
Breakfast including a sliced muffin and some coffee
